calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Dec-07-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Gina Gonzales/Lyn Bura, CSR: Susan Lee.
Branden E. Bickel, Esq. and David N. Kuhn, Esq., for Plaintiff: Gramercy Towers Condominium Association, with Witness: Evon Shelley, present, sworn and examined.
Exhibit 1---Schedule of Amounts Due -------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Request for Judicial Notice --------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Valery Obolonsky aka Valery Obolonskiy as follows:
Damages $35,637.20
Late Charges $3,736.26
Prejudgment Interest $3,736.26
Attorney's Fees $35,946.54
Costs $1,784.50, for a total of $80,548.25
Judgment signed in open court.
Mr. Bickel did not stipulate for the return of Plaintiff's Exhibits 1-2.
Two documents marked as Plaintiff's 1 and 2 were placed in an envelope and placed in a secured cabinet for safe keeping.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2006 Continued To Dec-29-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2006 Continued To Nov-09-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
